programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a famous "haunted house" attraction is closed./Wade inadvertently defeats a local weasel./Jon discovers he is related to a traitor of George Washington.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: China Cat/Cock-A-Doodle Dandy/Beach Blanket Bonzo
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield hear the story of the dragon and the cat./Roy's Morning bugle keeps waking up an angry bear./Garfield's attempt at a beach romance are hindered.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Lemon Aid/Hog Noon/Video Airlines
programme.desc: Jon wins a free car./A school mate is coming back to settle an old score./Jon decides to go to a video store.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Mail Animal/Peanut-Brained Rooster/Mummy Dearest
programme.desc: Garfield gets their mailman fired./Roy can't get enough of the latest crop of peanuts./Garfield dreams he's in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind
programme.desc: Jon decides to fly Swindler Airlines to Miami./A mysterious message arrives./A friendly alien lands in Jon's backyard.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Pelham
programme.desc: A daughter spends 25 years pursuing the truth behind her mother's mysterious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: An Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A son discovers his mother's violent murder and police must track down the killer who committed a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case: Classified Murder
programme.desc: A couple answers a classified ad to buy a collectible motorcycle, but is never seen again. The ad turns out to be an untraceable fake, and the case will go cold for years until an unlikely witness comes forward.

programme.title: On the Case: Little Lamb
programme.desc: Investigators must identify a gunman who murdered a young mother but spared her child asleep in her car seat in the back of her minivan.

programme.title: On the Case: Followed Home
programme.desc: A mother of three is found shot to death inside the trunk of her car, just steps from her home.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Killer Britain
programme.desc: At the age of 25, Mark Martin murdered three young women in Nottingham city centre in the winter of 2004-2005. Since his teens, Mark Martin had been fixated on serial killers, and had an ambition to become Nottingham’s first serial killer.

programme.title: Killer Britain
programme.desc: Glyn Dix shot dead his landlady in 1979. While serving a life sentence he met and fell in love with a fellow inmate’s mother. They married, but three years after his release he killed his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Strange Truth
programme.desc: In March 2003, Ramona Krotine left an office party and was never seen alive again. 24 hours later, she was found in the trunk of her car, beaten and shot to death. At first, police suspected a botched robbery but later believed her husband was to blame.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: In 1976, Deborah Gardner, a Peace Corps worker, was murdered while on assignment in the South Pacific island nation of Tonga. Dennis Priven, a 24-year-old fellow Peace Corps worker, who appeared to be obsessed with Gardner, was charged by Tongan police.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of El Segundo
programme.desc: In July 1957 Richard Phillips and Milton Curtis, two California police officers on a routine stop, were gunned down by a man who had just committed robbery and rape nearby. Investigators searched for over 45 years for the man who murdered two of their own

programme.title: 48 Hours: Where's Our Baby?
programme.desc: In November 1997, Marlene and Steve Aisenberg reported their five-month-old daughter Sabrina missing from her crib. Police soon focused on the parents as authorities became convinced that they knew more about the baby’s disappearance than they admitted.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death of a Dream
programme.desc: In 2002, dancer Catherine Woods went to New York in search of fame but became a stripper to pay the rent. She started seeing Paul Cortez while living with her ex-boyfriend David Haughn. In November 2005, she was murdered. The two men became suspects.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A report on the March 1988 murder of legendary racecar driver Mickey Thompson and his wife Trudy. Thompson’s sister is convinced that Michael Goodwin, her brother’s former partner, was the killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home . Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) is nervous when Holly (Kristen Johnston) starts dating his top client – basketball player Kevin Tyler (Amar'e Stoudemire). Haskell (Wayne Knight) lures Stuart (David Alan Basche) into the world of sports betting.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys can't resolve their differences, Holly sends the three of them to couples' therapy, where they discover that Holly is the problem.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly takes Haskell on a practice date, and finds herself blown away by Haskell's hidden talents. Stuart embarrasses Phil when he tries way too hard to fit in with Phil's friends.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly tries to get to the bottom of a big secret between Eden and her boss. Stuart is about to be reunited with his beloved dog – until Phil loses him.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Goes Vegan Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey decides to take on a vegan diet and lifestyle, but she may have ulterior motives in doing so.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Staycation Episode
programme.desc: Nick tries to give his family the best vacation ever but things do not go well at all.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Thief Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey steals sixty dollars from Gigi's wallet and turns back around and blames Kevin for it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Bad Dream Episode
programme.desc: Kevin and Nick goes to an R-rated movie, but Kevin has nightmares from seeing it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The 22 Episode
programme.desc: The family oversleeps on the day Lindsey is scheduled to sing the national anthem at a baseball game. Meanwhile, Kevin gets sick.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Cooking Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne go head to head in the kitchen when Nick says cooking is \\"easy\\" and Suzanne challenges him to a family cooking competition.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A body is found floating at a dock in a North Florida creek. US Police initially suspect a motive of robbery, but the victim's complex love life suggests otherwise.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A drought at a French lake reveals a sunken Toyota holding the body of a UK expat who's been missing for two years. Her controlling husband becomes police's prime suspect.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A US woman allegedly drowns in the bathtub, but her husband's story doesn't add up. When his second wife also drowns two years on, police's worst fears are confirmed.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South London to unravel the unbelievable story of Banaz Mahmod, a woman murdered by members of her own family.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Liverpool to unravel the notorious murder of James Bulger, who was abducted and killed by two 10-year-old boys.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South Yorkshire to explore the bizarre case of a man dubbed 'The Rotherham Shoe Rapist'.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)
programme.desc: The lifeless, mutilated body of a woman is found in the Rambouillet Forest.

programme.title: The Case: The Roissy Bagger (Amaury de Hauteclocque)
programme.desc: While directing the anti-terrorist unit at 36 Quai des Orfèvres, Commissioner De Hauteclocque finds himself faced with a case that is making headlines.

programme.title: The Case: Lupine Arsene of the Palaces
programme.desc: A breathtaking international investigation worthy of the blockbuster “Catch Me If You Can.

programme.title: The Case: The Strangler of Strasbourg (Philip Hittinger)
programme.desc: In 2012, when Commander Philippe Hittinger was entrusted with one of the oldest “cold cases” in France, he could not imagine the outcome.

programme.title: The Case: A Crime Too Perfect (Stephane Fournier)

programme.title: The Case: A Predator of the Court (Véronique Béchu)
programme.desc: Véronique Béchu has handled hundreds of rape and incest cases. The protection of minors is its hobbyhorse. But the police commander will never forget one investigation.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1977, the body of a young woman is found covered in flies and maggots. Police officers fail to identify the victim until they utilize revolutionary technology which breaks open the case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1968, a 60-year-old is brutally raped and killed inside the walls of her own home. A devastating flood halts the police investigation until ground-breaking science offers new hope.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1998, a 12-year-old girl and a 38-year-old woman are found raped and murdered. The case goes cold for over a decade until genetic genealogy uncovers the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, a young woman is found dead at a military base in Orange County, California. Using forensic genealogy, experts break open the 40-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, in Ohio, the nude body of 17-year-old Barbara Blatnik is found face down on a rural road. She had been violently raped and strangled. Could this murder finally be solved with the help of genetic genealogy?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1988, Janet Tinsley reports her 8-year-old daughter April missing after she fails to return home. Three days later, a man out jogging makes a gruesome discovery in a nearby ditch.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry persuades the vicar to let him run the local charity auction.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If You Knew Nunu
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Double Trouble

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Big Island, Small Town
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jonah is Missing
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing?20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Suga On My Cuffs

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mothers and Daughters
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take on the heartbreaking case of Rachel. Rachel's mom bailed her out of jail on condition that she go to AA meetings and stick to a curfew. But Rachel hasn't kept up her end of the bargain, and now her mother wants her back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dog Is Smokin'
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his tooth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Snooze, You Lose

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Judgment Day

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Moms & Dads
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Silent Revolution of Truth
programme.desc: The award-winning film documents the amazing, true-life adventures of Billy Meier, the only proven UFO contactee.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Secret: Evidence We Are Not Alone
programme.desc: This story and the trail of scientific discovery that followed proves that the official US government position on UFOs has been, and still is, a carefully orchestrated deception designed to hide the most extraordinary secret in recorded history.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Avalanches
programme.desc: Whenever there is unstable snow and gravity, gravity always wins. George travels to the Rocky Mountains to learn about how to stay alive in the back country.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Emissaries
programme.desc: Our solar system is vast, from our own star the Sun to Earth is nearly 150 million kilometers or 1 Astronomical Unit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: Perhaps that American politician was right. There are indeed things we know we don’t know.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space? The unique environment, the lack of taste in their food and the smell of canned air all contribute to the stresses of living and working in space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Invasion on Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare new missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson: Winchester Cathedral
programme.desc: Tony Robinson explores Winchester cathedral.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Forth Rail Bridge
programme.desc: The Forth Rail Bridge has grown to symbolise Scotland.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Tyne Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell explores the story of the Tyne Bridge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: Tower Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell uncovers the extraordinary story of Tower Bridge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Britannia Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell recounts the story of the Britannia Bridge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Clifton Suspension Bridge

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Salvador, Brazil

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.desc: Watch the free CBS News 24/7 live stream for breaking news & in-depth reporting.

programme.title: Arthur: Blabbermouth/All Grown Up
programme.desc: Buster is hurt when he learns his friends don't trust him to keep a secret. Then, the gang finds a mysterious fortune telling game at the library and gets a hint of what their futures could hold.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie
programme.desc: When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.

programme.title: Arthur: Fernlets by Fern/Prunella and the Haunted Locker
programme.desc: Muffy talks Fern into writing poems for a new line of greeting cards which becomes the hit of Elwood City, but booming business causes Fern to burn out. Prunella is assigned a new school locker, which is rumored to be haunted!

programme.title: Arthur: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery
programme.desc: Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: The Cherry Tree/Matchmaker Matchbreaker
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur: Dear Adil/Bitzi's Break-Up
programme.desc: Arthur is worried that his letters to his new Turkish pen pal, Adil, will be boring. After all, how can Elwood City compare to Arthur's fantastical ideas about Turkey? Bitzi is breaking up with her boyfriend, and Buster is really sad.

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot
programme.desc: The latest animated hit movie about a boy and his truck has left Muffy and Francine disappointed. Why doesn't there seem to be any cool female characters on screen? After watching "The Wedding Channel," D.W. wants to get married!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 2
programme.desc: Film lifting the lid on the secret events surrounding the Russian submarine, Red October, that went missing in 1968, and which brought the Soviet Union and US to the brink of war.

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury

programme.desc: Shredder captures Irma and creates an android Irma programmed to destroy the Turtles. The zap-happy robotic Irma causes havoc in the TV newsroom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Great Boldini
programme.desc: Mobster Don Turtelli and his cousin the magician, the Great Baldini, steal the famous Tortellini Emerald.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Gang's All Here

programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to learn to dance the mambo to please his lovely she-bear. He finds a learning kit at the ranger's home which has a dance carpet with footprints.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After receiving a terrible blow on the head, Grizzly thinks he's a rodent and tries to get the gang to adopt him.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is exhausted, and he goes to fetch a pillow and a sleeping mask, but the Lemmings have entirely different plans for the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers that the frenzied breakdance the Lemmings are doing is actually due to the fleas they are infested with.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Another heat wave, and even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzly discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzly, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insect.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's a grand prize, a giant jar of Yummy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzly is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzly's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy can't believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. He soon realises it's the Lemmings who are playing around with a magnet.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzly melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzly steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away while he prepares a party for his beloved she-bear. But his double's artificial intelligence leaves a lot to be desired.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzly believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzly and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzly, who is trying to have a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzly's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzly sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man

programme.desc: Steve snatches a U.S. ambassador from a kidnap ring, but a statesman is then taken; guest Leif Erickson.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Plane-crash survivors Steve and Oscar still face a threat from a group attempting to sabotage international negotiations.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner helps a young woman whose father left her a wax museum, now run by her unscrupulous uncle.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 211

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: After moving into an old country house, Enrico has a series of horrifying encounters that make him realize he's not the only one residing in the home.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: After the loss of her true love, Beverly is tormented by evil spirits bent on her destruction. Charlene purchases a home haunted by a murdered woman who frightens her.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That was so weird!
programme.desc: A beautiful old-but-haunted town hall, under the shadow of Pendle Hill, is investigated as the team visit Lancashire. Phil witnesses an unexplained figure, Dale gets an unwelcome surprise, and Sara does a vigil with a royal ‘guest’.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: There's knocking upstairs!
programme.desc: A ghostly lady, a spectral young boy, and other paranormal incidents are investigated by the Are You Haunted team at a former textile mill in West Yorkshire. Investigator Miki York once again joins the team for a night full of unexplained occurrences.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who whistled then?
programme.desc: A haunted market venue with a dark past is investigated by the team. A distressed Dale has to leave a vigil, two team members see a dark shape, and there’s a phantom whistler. But who is put in charge of this investigation?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Baker Street Bachelors
programme.desc: A political leader is being blackmailed, and to find the blackmailers, Holmes and Watson join a marriage bureau. However, things don't go quite as planned, and Holmes winds up getting arrested and thrown in jail.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Diamond Tooth
programme.desc: While walking along the banks of the River Thames, Watson finds a diamond tooth. The article takes on more meaning later, however, when Holmes learns that the body of a murder victim had been discovered near where Watson found the tooth.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Haunted Gainsborough
programme.desc: Malcolm MacGregan will lose his family's Scottish castle if he can't make the mortgage payment, by midnight.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. It turns out that Farnsworth had a clause inserted in this will that his death, no matter what the apparent cause, would be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes examines an odd story told to him by a member of the 'League of Red-Headed Men'.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Inspector Lestrade looks to Holmes for answers, after two men are murdered on separate occasions.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Tyrant's Daughter
programme.desc: A chemist is accused of the murder of his fiancé's stepfather, who was determined to keep the two apart.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A school boy vandalizes church steps with faculty names, that are then later found dead.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes in Washington
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson travel to Washington D.C. in order to prevent a secret document from falling into enemy hands.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants take part in a team competition involving 10 dishes of lobster ravioli that must be prepared perfectly. The winners earn a swim at a Beverly Hills residence.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pair side dishes with four different types of protein; while the losing team makes honey taffy from scratch, the winners spend a day at Laguna Beach; the teams prepare a breakfast reception for a wedding.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must pick a team leader for the next dinner service; a chef serves an undercooked dish; a contestant is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Contestants from each team must work in pairs and present a unique pizza dish to Ramsay; the losers clean up and prepare both kitchens for dinner service, while the winners go to a luxurious hotel; one team runs out of a crucial ingredient.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team that prepares the most-impressive Southern-inspired menu for a sorority's anniversary party wins a trip to Las Vegas; both teams struggle with communication during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are given 30 minutes to create an entrée from surprise ingredients; Ramsay conducts one-on-one evaluations.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 1st Edition Apparition
programme.desc: TAPS is revisiting Edith Wharton's home, The Mount, in Lenox, Massachusetts. It's believed Edith andher husband could be behind increased activity since the team's last investigation in 2008.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: All Aboard the Ghost Train
programme.desc: This historic roundhouse and rail yard is connected to more that just old trains. The frightening remnants of a serial killer, horrific accidents and one of the worst train crashes have two people questioning strange encounters.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost Guards
programme.desc: An armory that's been standing for over 100 years harbors a ghostly mystery. Recent female leadership is coinciding with increased paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantom For the First Course
programme.desc: A renowned restaurant, The Whitney, once owned by a lumber baron in the 1800's, might still have family members hanging around its halls. Renovations and construction around the property could be behind the uprising of spirits.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Children in the Attic
programme.desc: One of the oldest yacht clubs in the USA is also one of the most haunted! A mother and her son are entangled in phenomena involving a frightening family from the past with a strange story to tell.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Pirates
programme.desc: Fear is spreading at Fort Taber-Fort Rodmanthat a new \\"living history event\\" has stirred up frightening paranormal activity on the park grounds.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Buh-Bye
programme.desc: Joan ends the friendship between her and Toni after finding out that Toni has been discussing her personal life with co-workers behind her back. Meanwhile, Lynn is trying to cope with her new living situation with Vosco, and his lack of a job.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won’t He
programme.desc: Yvonne is concerned that William is never going to marry her because they have not set a date for the wedding. When Yvonne asks Joan for advice, Joan tries her best to stay out of it but ends up telling Yvonne to move in with William first to try it out.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Scary Kim

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Election 2000

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: TURKEY DAY BLUES

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Falcon (Part 3)
programme.desc: A trained falcon is summoned in a last-ditch rescue attempt when Jim Phelps finds his IMF endangered by a traitor's assassination plot in the last of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Chico
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Gitano
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Phantoms
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Terror
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of a kind-hearted single mother points to three suspects, all claiming innocence.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, the police investigate and discover that she had rather an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a spate of murders in a small Louisiana community, detectives struggle to extract a confession from the main suspect until they invoke the memory of his deceased mother.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a teen disappears, her family joins forces with the police to find her. But hopes of finding her alive quickly diminish when an alarming lead comes to light.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Scott Gellatly swept neighbour Lori Jackson off her feet. But her mother Merry had doubts about Scott. He controlled where Lori went, and who she spoke to. So when things turned violent, it wasn’t just Lori in the firing line.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Heather and Mark Arthur had been married 30 years. But their marriage wasn’t always a happy one: Mark was controlling and jealous, and eventually Heather decided she wanted out. When she confessed to finding new love, Mark’s jealousy boiled over.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Bill Taylor loved wife Angela, even when she left him, even when she met new partner, Paul Cannon. But Angela hated Bill, because he refused to divorce her. The answer, in Angela and Paul’s minds, was to end the marriage by any means necessary.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas

programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PARANORMAL ACTIVITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: ANCIENT MEGASTRUCTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Clifton Suspension Bridge
programme.desc: The story of Brunel's famous bridge over the Avon gorge.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Humber Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell tells the story of the Humber Bridge.

programme.title: Concorde: Part Two
programme.desc: By the early 1980s, Concorde was admired the world over.

programme.title: Great British Royal Ships: Her Majesty's Yacht Britannia
programme.desc: A vessel that has been a floating palace and a rescue vessel.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur: The Blackout/Mei Lin Takes a Stand
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Elwood City, and a total blackout leaves its residents without electricity! Will Arthur and DW survive without AC and TV? Binky's baby sister Mei-Lin isn't keen on learning to walk and would rather stick to crawling.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies
programme.desc: Bailey is missing! Muffy discovers a series of clues and is left wondering, who exactly IS Bailey? Then, everyone loves getting trophies, right? It turns out that Fern could not care less about them.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Numbers Nightmare/Brain Gets Hooked
programme.desc: When the gang discovers a list of their class rankings in Principal Haney's office, they are all taken for a surprise. Brain gets hooked on the latest tween reality show and then starts to ignore his friends and his schoolwork.

programme.title: Arthur: What Is That Thing?/Buster's Best Behavior
programme.desc: Arthur and friends are all faced with seemingly impossible tasks, from fixing a model biplane to babysitting D.W. And, Buster knows he's fun, but he's beginning to feel like he's not particularly good at anything.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Crunch Cereal Contest/D.W. Flips
programme.desc: A year's supply of Crunch Cereal is in store for the person who can write the new Crunch Cereal jingle, and Arthur is sure he can do it. Next, how hard can it be to do a cartwheel on a balance beam? D.W. is about to find out.

programme.title: Arthur: Flippity Francine/Muffy Takes the Wheel
programme.desc: When Muffy posts a goofy video of Francine on the Muffington Post, Francine worries she will become the laughing stock of the entire school. And it's the 1st Annual Lakewood Derby and Muffy's revved up!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Split Decision/Muffy Goes Metropolitan
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Last Flight of the B-17
programme.desc: Twenty-six metres beneath the waves at the foot of the majestic Calvi Citadel in Corsica lies an American plane from the Second World War.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: Secret Bunkers of Omaha Beach
programme.desc: On June 6th 1944, Lieutenant-colonel Rudder’s Rangers company climbs the cliffs of the Pointe du Hoc in Normandy with the mission to destroy the German cannons.

programme.title: Greatest Escapes of WWII
programme.desc: The elite German submariners who caused havoc in the heart of the American desert, the playboy pilot they couldn’t cage, and the young lovers whose escape defied all odds.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Discover the true story of a German Luftwaffe pilot in World War II who risked his own life to save the crew of an American B-17 bomber.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Wrens
programme.desc: When Gilbert Roberts arrives to set up a tactical school for the U-boats, he receives a frosty reception from Admiral Noble. Enlisting the help of Jean Laidlaw and a small team of Wrens, Roberts begins unpicking the flaws in Walker’s ‘Buttercup’.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 1
programme.desc: Film lifting the lid on the secret events surrounding the Russian submarine, Red October, that went missing in 1968, and which brought the Soviet Union and US to the brink of war.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: United Airlines Flight #232 is crippled when one of its three engines explodes, completely knocking out the hydraulic system and making it impossible to steer.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just out of Honolulu the cargo door of United Airlines Flight 811 opens at an altitude of 33,000 feet, ripping a huge hole in the 747 taking out five rows of seats – and nine passengers with it.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: At the height of thunderstorm season in Arkansas, American Airlines 1420 ends in disaster. The MD80 ploughs off a wet runway down an embankment and breaks apart, killing 11 people.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The pilot of Swissair Flight 111 smells smoke in the cockpit. Minutes later fire and complete electrical failure cause the MD11 to crash into the Atlantic killing all 229 passengers and crew on board.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A holiday home business in France struggles with expensive maintenance costs. In Mallorca, a British-run adventure company deals with a very nervous cliff jumper, a couple of Brits in Spain spend two years’ worth of savings in eight weeks.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A spectacular new excursion brings big earnings to a British run adventure company in Mallorca, a couple of expat-wannabe-caterers in France struggle to feed the crowds, and a couple from Essex open a glamping site in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Norfolk couple moves to a picturesque French village to take over the only hotel, a Northumberland chef’s dream to open a restaurant in Mallorca, and two Belfast twenty-somethings gamble all their savings on buying a bar on the Costa del Sol.

programme.title: Storm Hawks

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Puppet
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Edgar races in and tells the KFDP that they have to go to the Miss Megalopolis Beauty Pageant. Jet’s heard about human pageants and he’s all excited. But Edgar tells him to calm down – their mission is to retrieve one of Skor’s gems!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: While traveling To Arderial to persuade the Guardian Hyren to join their quest, the Final Dreamers discover that the cloud-dwelling Arderialites aren't impressed with their past exploits.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When billionaire inventor, GRIFFEN HAWKSMORE, is snatched by black cloud during the unveiling of a new weapons defense system, Captain Strong fears that Raven is trying to steal the design for himself.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.
