programme.desc: All of the couples join Andy Cohen onstage; Damon faces his actions in Cabo; Aydin and Mariah defend themselves; Toya opens up about her past love; Contessa speaks her truth; the ladies hash out old and new issues trying to come together as a group.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone prepares to send Michael off to college with one last basketball game; Anila tries to impress her parents with her new home; Eugene confronts Toya about her behavior; after an epic basketball showdown, Heavenly and Toya exchange heated words.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone and Heavenly's feud breaks up Damon's birthday party; Toya discusses racism and diversity with her boys; Heavenly helps a gossip blogger; Anila confronts financial woes due to the pandemic; Simone throws a graduation party for her son.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: As the tension grows between Jackie and Simone, their husbands try and talk sense into them; Heavenly gets an unexpected call for an opportunity to help a young protester; Contessa asks Paris to throw a healing crystal event for the group.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: A three-way negotiation between Flagg, Tracy, and Altman goes nowhere, leaving Flagg without a house; Tracy goes against the odds to sell an unfinished masterpiece; Altman's protégé turns a sweet deal sour.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy anticipates doing all the work when she agrees to a co-listing with Flagg; Altman looks to break records when he takes on the challenge of finding a buyer for an off-market property in Encino.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as the Altmans struggle with work-life balance, juggling L.A. properties and building out the Newport office; Altman works with a familiar face to bring a slice of Orange County to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Flagg creates a marketing video with a special guest to promote the grand dame of historical estates in Pasadena; the Altmans announce the upcoming opening ceremony of their new office in Orange County; Tracy encounters an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Altmans' tension boils over as Heather rushes to finish the Orange County office for their grand opening; Josh tries to hit their year-end goals; Flagg hosts a tour of his Pasadena estate.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing San Francisco
programme.desc: Real estate agents Justin Fichelson, Andrew Greenwell and Roh Habibi strive to outsell one another in a market filled with demanding young tech clients; veteran agent Andrew fails to predict a colleague's mistakes; newcomer Roh must prove his worth.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: As American Airlines Flight 965 prepares to descend, an alarm sounds in the cockpit. The aircraft slams into the top of a mountain, disintegrating on contact. Only four people survive the crash.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Avianca Airlines Flight 52 was low on fuel and they hadn’t received word to approach JFK yet. The plane ran out of fuel, and the engines shut down. It crashed in a suburb killing 73 people.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Flight 243 from Maui to Honolulu loses a chunk of its roof mid-flight, but lands safely. The cause is linked to the disappearance of a flight attendant.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: DHL A300's crew battles to land for 16 min at Baghdad's airport without hydraulics during a routine mail run.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Minutes after take off from Tokyo en route to Osaka, the tailfin blows off the huge Boeing 747. The plane is now out of control.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Buckinghamshire find out if their new French cooking school has hit the right notes, two Essex boys finally open their Spanish bar. And will boiler bother bring the dreams of two Brit bed & breakfast owners in France crashing down?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Will a biking-obsessed Brit ever get his bed & breakfast off the starting grid? A couple from Derbyshire head to the Spanish Costas to open a unique food business, and will delays in opening their fishing lake ruin an Essex couple’s new bed & breakfast?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In France, guests arrive at a Brit-run gite—but will the unfinished rooms put them off their stay? Will the dreams of a Derbyshire couple setting up a pasta parlour in Spain float away? And an Essex couple face friction in the kitchen.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Derbyshire expand the men. In France, a swam of insects threaten the launch of a Brit-run holiday complex, and a couple of lawn bowls lovers from Kent begin try to persuade the French to play this very English game.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Set sail with two Scots as they launch their new Spanish boat business, a reviewer checks in to an Essex couple’s French fishing lake, and a couple from Kent search for French members for their new lawn bowls club.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Will bad weather bring an end to a Scottish couple’s dream boat business in Spain? A new bed & breakfast owner must decide if his business can support a life in France, and the Kent couple opening a lawns bowl club in France end the season.

programme.title: Storm Hawks

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony's vision of Evu being captured by Shadow Magi prompts Edyn and Strag to join him as Evu's bodyguards in her journey across the Sands of D’Resh. Three Shadow Magi manage to track them down nonetheless and a battle ensues to protect Evu.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future
programme.desc: Varis is on the verge of victory unless Playmaker can make one last play to stop him!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.
